rationale: Farina 95% stable on v31 (20-run). Residual 5% is acceptable GPT noise at €0.05 avg.

realBug.answer: PARTIAL — intermittent Pass C Valor digit drift, not structural
realBug.evidence: 1/20 runs at 25.52; unit_price always 26.52 on discounted row

pureGptVariance.evidence: v30 0/10 → v31 95% — prompt-sensitive digit OCR, not geometry/binder regression

promptV32Roi.note: v31 example recovered 0%→60% in 5-run; diminishing returns; binder guard may outperform

binderSafeguard.rule: qty=1 AND discount_pct>0 AND unit_price > total → set total = unit_price (or re-derive from gross×discount)

v32ExpectedRecovery.note: Assumes 50% recovery of remaining incorrect runs — optimistic
